title: Caddy rate_limit syntax invalid
description: docs/deployment.md line 29 uses `rate_limit @auth {remote.ip} 5r/m` which is not valid syntax for any known Caddy rate limiting plugin. The mholt/caddy-ratelimit plugin uses block-style zone configuration: `rate_limit { zone name { key {remote.ip} events 5 window 1m } }`. The current syntax would fail on Caddy startup. The nginx example is correct.
close_reason: Fixed: Caddy rate_limit now uses correct block syntax with zone/key/events/window
